description_short: Disables pillar requirements for elevated pipes, belts, balancers, lifts and sorters, lifts placement height caps, and allows free pillar removal.
description_long: Removes the need for pillars when building elevated pipes, conveyors, balancers (flat, U-shape, molten, pipe), lifts (flat, U-shape) and sorters. These structures no longer auto-place pillars on construction and no longer require pillar support to be placed. Balancers, lifts and sorters can be placed at any height (up to 30 tiles); pipes and belts can be raised up to 14 tiles with the up-arrow (matching the path-finder's Z-range cap). Existing pillars can always be removed with the Modify Pillars tool regardless of whether they are supporting a transport. Changes are applied to all relevant prototypes at game initialization.
